name: Entra Risky Accounts Using Personal Email Domains
description: Detects active entra_risky accounts using personal email domains instead of corporate identity domains.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.user_principal_name AS email FROM entra_risky_users u WHERE 1=1 AND LOWER(COALESCE(u.user_principal_name, '')) SIMILAR TO '%@(gmail|yahoo|hotmail|outlook)\\.com'
remediation: Migrate account identities to corporate domains and disable personal-domain access where not explicitly approved.
